User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile. Owns the list of device IDs paired by this user.

devices.description: List of device IDs (e.g. MF-A3F9) this user has access to

Member.title: Family Member
Member.description: A user granted viewer access to one or more devices by the owner.

devices.description: Subset of device IDs this member can see

Device.title: Water Valve Device
Device.description: Represents one physical valve. Completely anonymous — no ownerId. Ownership is tracked on the User side.

id.description: Unique device code e.g. MF-A3F9, pre-flashed on the ESP32

claimedAt.description: Timestamp of first pairing. Null if unclaimed.

HourlyRecord.title: Hourly Consumption Batch
HourlyRecord.description: 12 readings (every 5 min) sent every hour by the ESP32.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile + array of paired device IDs

/users/{userId}/members/{memberUid}.description: Family members granted access by the owner.

/devices/{deviceId}.description: Anonymous device. No ownerId. Ownership lives in /users/{uid}.devices[]

accessPatterns.getUserDevices: Read /users/{uid}.devices[] then for each ID read /devices/{deviceId}
accessPatterns.pairDevice: 1) Verify /devices/{deviceId} exists  2) arrayUnion deviceId into /users/{uid}.devices  3) set claimedAt if null
accessPatterns.shareWithMember: 1) Lookup target by email  2) setDoc /users/{ownerUid}/members/{memberUid}  3) arrayUnion deviceId into /users/{memberUid}.devices
